## Summary

<!-- What does this change do and why? Link the driving spec / milestone / ADR. -->

- Related specification(s):
- Related milestone(s):
- Related ADR(s) (DECISIONS.md):

## Type of change

- [ ] Specification / documentation
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Infrastructure / tooling
- [ ] Breaking change (requires ADR + VERSIONING.md update)

## Definition of Done checklist

- [ ] Specification updated (implementation follows specification)
- [ ] ADR added/updated when an architectural decision changed (`DECISIONS.md`)
- [ ] Documentation complete
- [ ] Tests included and passing (unit / integration / e2e as applicable)
- [ ] Public APIs documented and type safe
- [ ] Security reviewed (`SECURITY_MODEL.md`, `SECURITY_POLICIES.md`)
- [ ] Performance evaluated
- [ ] Accessibility reviewed (`ACCESSIBILITY.md`)
- [ ] Backward compatibility verified (`VERSIONING.md`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md`, `ROADMAP.md`, `FEATURE_MATRIX.md` updated where applicable
- [ ] CI passes

## Constitution compliance

- [ ] This change respects the document precedence hierarchy.
- [ ] This change respects module boundaries and introduces no cyclic dependencies.
- [ ] This change contains no placeholder implementations where a practical one is possible.
